title: Program config layer
description: Wires a state's program to a PolicyEngine variable. Depth constraint (not expressible in this schema, enforced at runtime/CI instead): a config whose 'extends' is non-null must point to a config whose own 'extends' is null -- one level only, no chains, no cycles.

state.description: Use "federal" as the sentinel for a base config that other configs extend.

state_dependency.description: The one state-code dependency class, e.g. CoStateCodeDependency. Null for federal-only configs.

extends.description: The 'program' name of the base config this one extends, e.g. 'snap'. Null if fully self-contained.

additional_inputs.description: Dependency class names beyond extends's base (or the complete list if extends is null). Does not include state_dependency.

pe_period_month.description: Default null (use pe_period as-is). Only federal SNAP sets this today, to '01'.
